mapper.select:
SELECT MAX(id) FROM moondap.balance_questions
AND status = 'active'
AND is_spicy = 0
AND category = #{category}
SELECT MIN(id) FROM moondap.balance_questions WHERE status = 'active'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO moondap.balance_comments(question_id, nickname, selected_side ,content) VALUES (#{id}, #{nickname}, #{side}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM moondap.balance_comments WHERE question_id = #{id} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO moondap.balance_questions(id, title, is_spicy, category, status, option_1_text, option_1_image_path, option_2_text, option_2_image_path, user_id, option_1_count, option_2_count, total_count) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{isSpicy}, #{category}, #{status}, #{option1Text}, #{option1ImagePath}, #{option2Text}, #{option2ImagePath}, #{userId}, #{option1Count}, #{option2Count}, #{totalCount});
